original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Charlotte, Olivia, Harper, and Owen. As Charlotte put it, "Harper is a knight if and only if Owen is a knave". "If Olivia is a knight then Charlotte is a knave," Olivia declared. "Charlotte is not a knight," Harper declared. Owen remarked, "Charlotte is not a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
